one_time_description: Contribution to Windfarm Legacy Trust of $17,003,250 (prior year $87,500,000)
economic_notes: Henvey Inlet Wind LP generates significant revenue (~$7.4M). Nigig Power Corporation (NPC) is wholly-owned GBE in wind energy sector. 33.33% interest in Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (construction industry). Gas Bar operation. Pickerel Contracting Limited subsidiary. Trailer park operation. Robinson Huron Treaty Litigation Fund commitment of $63,000/year.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 but audit report dated April 26, 2024 — significant delay. Complex consolidated entity includes Henvey Inlet First Nation Key Harbour Settlement Trust, Adtores Properties GP Ltd., HIW Property Holdings LP, HIW Property Holdings GP Inc., and Pickerel Contracting Limited as consolidated subsidiaries. NPC (Nigig Power Corporation) is a GBE accounted for by modified equity method — share of income $24.7M dominates bottom line. Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership is a non-controlled entity at 33.33% ownership. Contribution to Windfarm Legacy Trust of $17M is a major recurring non-operating expense (prior year $87.5M). Accumulated surplus of $49.5M includes $49.7M from GBE/partnerships. FNFA loan of ~$97M secured by revenue regulations. Legal claim against First Nation and NPC for $173,197,700 settled subsequent to year end. Total government transfers estimated as Federal ($5,514,000) + Provincial ($1,261,946) + KEB ($1,605,070) = $8,781,016. Housing expenses combined Band Housing ($192,290) + CMHC Housing ($177,316) = $369,606. No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text.
